CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMUS, WALTER MATEO

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-07-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-12-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FEB-07-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-17-2003.
RE-SEND PANEL OF ARBITRATORS - SYSTEM PROBLEM - DEF. ATTY. ON FIRST PANEL SENT. REJECTION DATE APR-21-2003.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ROBERT KIRK PHILLIPS.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR STEVEN TOBIAS SAGER.
ARBITRATOR JACOB BURLAND APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-23-2003 THROUGH JUL-22-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-18-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR JACOB BURLAND TO COUNSELS: ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: JUNE 30,2003 @ 10:00 A.M.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFT
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-12-2003 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON AUG-05-2003 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS AND FEES.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-18-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-05-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
